text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega doesn't feel well, so I take her to
the infirmary to get some rest.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It's nothing serious... but if you insist.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Well... I don't hate you or anything...

text_block_list.name: Sheep
text_block_list.text:
Play with us! There's an alpaca and chinchilla here
as well!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: N-no... I don't have time for that...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Quit it, don't look at me like that... Nooo, I can't
help myself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After such a refreshing dream, Admire Vega
recovers quickly and returns to me with a slight
smile on her face.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...I told you I don't have time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega oversleeps. Her condition hasn't
recovered, and she blames herself for sleeping
too much.
